rationale: Both reach the correct disposition (duplicate of #4808/#4809) and correctly diagnose the missing-migration root cause, but X asserts with unwarranted confidence that the fix is 'fixed on main' and fabricates suspiciously specific unverifiable artifacts (exact test counts, a verbatim replacement comment, '9 tests should pass'), which is risky given #4808 may not have merged. Y reaches the same duplicate conclusion but explicitly flags that #4808 was closed without merging and that the regression test added by #4810 doesn't cover this file, hedging honestly about what it could/couldn't verify from its own checkout — a more grounded and useful maintainer response given genuine ambiguity in the terse ground truth.
